props.description: Items rendered by the accordion.
props.name: items

props.description:
Single-open mode: at most one item is open.
Multi-open mode: any number of items can be open.
props.name: multiple

props.description: Icon override; defaults to the variant's standard icon. Always hidden from assistive technology.
props.name: icon

props.description: Renders a dismiss button and calls this when it is pressed.
props.name: onDismiss

props.description: Bold leading text of the alert.
props.name: title

props.description: Image alt text; defaults to `name`. Pass an empty string for decorative avatars.
props.name: alt

props.description: Name used for the initials fallback and default alt text.
props.name: name

props.description: Image URL; falls back to initials when missing or when the image fails to load.
props.name: src

props.description: Maximum items shown before middle items collapse into a menu.
props.name: collapseAfter

props.description: Items in hierarchy order; the last item is the current page.
props.name: items

props.description: Accessible name for the navigation landmark.
props.name: label

props.description: Accessible label applied as `aria-label`; also used as the default tooltip text.
props.name: label

props.description: Replaces the icon with a spinner and disables the button while true.
props.name: loading

props.description: Applies disabled styling and blocks interaction on interactive cards.
props.name: disabled

props.description: Button type used when the card renders an interactive element.
props.name: type

props.description: Heading element used for the title; defaults to 'h2'. Adjust to fit the page outline.
props.name: titleAs

props.description: Supporting text rendered below the label.
props.name: description

props.description: Visible label rendered next to the checkbox. Required outside a Field; inside a Field the Field's label is used.
props.name: label

props.description: Hides the label visually while keeping it available to screen readers.
props.name: visuallyHiddenLabel

props.description: Body content of the dialog.
props.name: children

props.description: Accessible label for the close button.
props.name: closeLabel

props.description: Initial open state when uncontrolled.
props.name: defaultOpen

props.description: Supporting text rendered under the title.
props.name: description

props.description: Action area rendered at the bottom of the dialog.
props.name: footer

props.description: Called when the dialog opens or closes.
props.name: onOpenChange

props.description: Controlled open state.
props.name: open

props.description: Element that receives focus after a controlled dialog closes.
props.name: restoreFocusRef

props.description: Width of the dialog surface.
props.name: size

props.description: Title rendered at the top; also the accessible name of the dialog.
props.name: title

props.description: Call to action rendered below the description.
props.name: action

props.description: Supporting text that explains the empty state.
props.name: description

props.description: Icon rendered above the title.
props.name: icon

props.description: Short heading for the empty state.
props.name: title

props.description: Heading element used for the title; defaults to 'h3'. Adjust to fit the page outline.
props.name: titleAs

props.description: The form control this field labels and describes.
props.name: children

props.description: Help text rendered below the control and linked to it for assistive technology.
props.name: description

props.description: Error message; marks the control as invalid and links the message to it.
props.name: error

props.description: Visible label associated with the control.
props.name: label

props.description: Marks the control as required and renders a required indicator.
props.name: required

props.description: Marks the control invalid without requiring a visible error message.
props.name: invalid

props.description: Accessible label announced by screen readers.
props.name: label

props.description: Diameter of the spinner.
props.name: size

props.description: Accessible label announced by screen readers while the region is loading.
props.name: label

props.description: Accessible label describing what the progress bar measures.
props.name: label

props.description: Horizontal alignment of the menu relative to the trigger.
props.name: align

props.description: Items rendered in the menu.
props.name: items

props.description: Accessible name for the menu.
props.name: label

props.description: Traps focus and blocks outside interaction while open. Defaults to false.
props.name: modal

props.description: Element that opens the menu; receives trigger props automatically.
props.name: trigger

props.description: Actions rendered beside the title; wraps below on narrow screens.
props.name: actions

props.description: Supporting text rendered under the title.
props.name: subtitle

props.description: Page title rendered as a heading.
props.name: title

props.description: Heading element used for the title; defaults to 'h1'. Adjust to fit the page outline.
props.name: titleAs

props.description: Accessible name for the navigation landmark.
props.name: label

props.description: Called with the next page when the user navigates.
props.name: onPageChange

props.description: Current page, one-based.
props.name: page

props.description: Total number of pages.
props.name: pageCount

props.description: Horizontal alignment of the content relative to the trigger.
props.name: align

props.description: Content rendered inside the popover surface.
props.name: children

props.description: Initial open state when uncontrolled.
props.name: defaultOpen

props.description: Accessible name for the dialog-like popover surface.
props.name: label

props.description: Called when the popover opens or closes.
props.name: onOpenChange

props.description: Controlled open state.
props.name: open

props.description: Side of the trigger the content opens on.
props.name: side

props.description: Element that toggles the popover; receives trigger props automatically.
props.name: trigger

props.description: Accessible name when there is no visible label.
props.name: aria-label

props.description: Marks the trigger invalid for form validation and screen readers.
props.name: aria-invalid

props.description: Explicit id; otherwise Field or an internal id is used.
props.name: id

props.description: Options rendered in the listbox.
props.name: options

props.description: Text shown when no value is selected.
props.name: placeholder

props.description: Size of the trigger button.
props.name: size

props.description: Supporting text rendered below the label.
props.name: description

props.description: Visible label describing the setting the switch controls. Required outside a Field; inside a Field the Field's label is used.
props.name: label

props.description: Track and thumb size.
props.name: size

props.description: Accessible caption describing the table, announced to screen readers.
props.name: caption

props.description: Column definitions rendered in header order.
props.name: columns

props.description: Vertical padding of cells.
props.name: density

props.description: Content shown when `rows` is empty and the table is not loading.
props.name: empty

props.description: Returns a stable, unique key for each row.
props.name: getRowKey

props.description: Renders skeleton rows in place of data and marks the region busy.
props.name: loading

props.description: Accessible label announced while skeleton rows are shown.
props.name: loadingLabel

props.description: Data rows rendered in the table body.
props.name: rows

props.description: Accessible name for the tab list.
props.name: aria-label

props.description: Initially active tab when uncontrolled.
props.name: defaultValue

props.description: Tabs rendered by the component.
props.name: items

props.description: Called with the new value when the active tab changes.
props.name: onValueChange

props.description: Controlled active tab value.
props.name: value

description: Rendered once near the app root so tooltips share open-delay grouping.

props.description: Element the tooltip describes; receives trigger props automatically.
props.name: children

props.description: Text rendered inside the tooltip.
props.name: content

props.description: Per-instance open delay in milliseconds; overrides the nearest TooltipProvider.
props.name: delayDuration

props.description: Preferred side of the trigger for the tooltip.
props.name: side

props.description: Keeps the bar at the top of its scrolling container.
props.name: sticky

props.description: Rail collapses labels until hover or focus; full keeps labels visible.
props.name: mode

props.description: Edge where the navigation is attached.
props.name: side

props.description: Uppercase heading shown above the items. Hidden in rail mode until the nav expands.
props.name: label

props.description: Marks the item as the current page; sets `aria-current="page"`.
props.name: active

props.description: Icon element shown before the label. Always visible, even in rail mode.
props.name: icon
